llm_verdict.message:
I’m not able to read or edit the `/etc/security/pwquality.conf` file because every command I run over the SSH session results in the connection being dropped (`Connection closed by 192.168.1.221`). 

Without the file’s current content I cannot safely perform the necessary backup, modify it, or verify the change. Please check that SSH is functioning correctly on the host and let me know the status so I can resume the remediation.
